Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(********************************************************************************************

 Monoidal Adjunctions

 In this file, we define monoidal adjunctions. We define this notion in the following
 way: a monoidal adjunction  is adjunction of categories such that both functors are
 lax monoidal and such that the unit and counit are monoidal transformations. This is
 given in [monoidal_adjunction]. A reference for this notion is Section 5.14 in
 https://www.irif.fr/~mellies/mpri/mpri-ens/biblio/categorical-semantics-of-linear-logic.pdf
 Note: this notion is what you obtain by unfolding adjunctions internal to the
 bicategory of monoidal categories.

 However, in practice it is often useful to use the following characterization: an
 adjunction is monoidal if the left adjoint is a strong monoidal functor. A reference
 for this result is Lemma 13 in https://hal.science/hal-00154229/document. The relevant
 statements are [monoidal_adjunction_from_strong] and [is_strong_left_adjoint].

 We prove the same results for symmetric monoidal adjunctions.

 Contents
 1. Monoidal adjunctions
 2. Accessors and builders
 3. Left adjoints are strongly monoidal
 3.1. Preservation of the unit
 3.2. Preservation of the tensor
 4. If the left adjoint is strong, then the adjunction is monoidal
 5. Symmetric monoidal adjunctions
 6. Accessors
 7. Symmetric monoidal adjunctions from strong functors
 8. Symmetric monoidal adjunctions to comonads

 ********************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Comonads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.FunctorCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.

Local Open Scope cat.

Import BifunctorNotations.
Import MonoidalNotations.

(**
 1. Monoidal adjunctions
 *)
Definition monoidal_adjunction
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (M₁ : monoidal C₁)
           (M₂ : monoidal C₂)
           (A : adjunction C₁ C₂)
           (L := left_adjoint A : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (R := right_adjoint A : C₂ ⟶ C₁)
           (η := adjunit A)
           (ε := adjcounit A)
  : UU
  := ∑ (HL : fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ L),
     ∑ (HR : fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ R),
     is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal _) (comp_fmonoidal_lax HL HR) η
     ×
     is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal_lax HR HL) (identity_fmonoidal _) ε.

(**
 2. Accessors and builders
 *)
Definition make_monoidal_adjunction
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
           {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
           {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
           (L := left_adjoint A : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (R := right_adjoint A : C₂ ⟶ C₁)
           (η := adjunit A)
           (ε := adjcounit A)
           (HL : fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ L)
           (HR : fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ R)
           (Hη : is_mon_nat_trans
                   (identity_fmonoidal _)
                   (comp_fmonoidal_lax HL HR)
                   η)
           (Hε : is_mon_nat_trans
                   (comp_fmonoidal_lax HR HL)
                   (identity_fmonoidal _)
                   ε)
  : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
  := HL ,, HR ,, Hη ,, Hε.

Section MonoidalAdjunctionAccessors.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
          {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
          {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
          (L := left_adjoint A : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (R := right_adjoint A : C₂ ⟶ C₁)
          (η := adjunit A)
          (ε := adjcounit A)
          (HA : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A).

  Definition fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint
    : fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ L
    := pr1 HA.

  Definition fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint
    : fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ R
    := pr12 HA.

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ pr1 A ∙ pr12 A
ε:= adjcounit A: pr12 A ∙ pr1 A ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint
     fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint) η

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ pr1 A ∙ pr12 A
ε:= adjcounit A: pr12 A ∙ pr1 A ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint
     fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint) η

    exact (pr122 HA).
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ pr1 A ∙ pr12 A
ε:= adjcounit A: pr12 A ∙ pr1 A ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint
     fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint)
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) ε

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ pr1 A ∙ pr12 A
ε:= adjcounit A: pr12 A ∙ pr1 A ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint
     fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint)
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) ε

    exact (pr222 HA).
  Qed.
End MonoidalAdjunctionAccessors.

(**
 3. Left adjoints are strongly monoidal
 *)
Section LeftAdjointStrong.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
          {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
          {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
          (L := left_adjoint A : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (R := right_adjoint A : C₂ ⟶ C₁)
          (η := adjunit A : functor_identity _ ⟹ L ∙ R)
          (ε := adjcounit A : R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity _)
          (HA : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A)
          (HL := fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
          (HR := fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (Hη := monoidal_adjunit HA)
          (Hε := monoidal_adjcounit HA).

  (**
   3.1. Preservation of the unit
   *)
  Definition is_strong_left_adjoint_on_unit
    : L (monoidal_unit M₁) --> monoidal_unit M₂
    := #L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR) · ε _.

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
is_inverse_in_precat (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_unit

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
is_inverse_in_precat (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_unit

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR) · ε I_{ M₂}) =
identity I_{ M₂}
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR) · ε I_{ M₂}
· fmonoidal_preservesunit HL =
identity (left_adjoint A I_{ M₁})

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR) · ε I_{ M₂}) =
identity I_{ M₂}
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· # L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR) · ε I_{ M₂} =
identity I_{ M₂}

      exact (pr2 Hε).
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR) · ε I_{ M₂}
· fmonoidal_preservesunit HL =
identity (left_adjoint A I_{ M₁})
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR)
· (ε I_{ M₂} · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) =
identity (left_adjoint A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR)
· (ε I_{ M₂} · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
?b = identity (left_adjoint A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR)
· (ε I_{ M₂} · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
ε I_{ M₂} · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
?t2 = ε I_{ M₂} · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL

        exact (nat_trans_ax ε _ _ (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR)
· (# (R ∙ L) (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)
   · ε (left_adjoint A I_{ M₁})) =
identity (left_adjoint A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR)
· (# L (# R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL))
   · ε (left_functor A I_{ M₁})) =
identity (left_functor A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR)
· # L (# R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL))
· ε (left_functor A I_{ M₁}) =
identity (left_functor A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR
   · # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL))
· ε (left_functor A I_{ M₁}) =
identity (left_functor A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR
   · # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL))
· ε (left_functor A I_{ M₁}) =
# (left_functor A) (adjunit A I_{ M₁})
· adjcounit A (left_functor A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
# L
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HR
   · # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)) =
# (left_functor A) (adjunit A I_{ M₁})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
fmonoidal_preservesunit HR
· # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) = adjunit A I_{ M₁}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
fmonoidal_preservesunit (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
· adjunit A I_{ M₁} = adjunit A I_{ M₁}

      apply id_left.
  Qed.

  (**
   3.2. Preservation of the tensor
   *)
  Section PreservesTensor.
    Context (x y : C₁).

    Definition is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor
      : L (x ⊗_{M₁} y) --> L x ⊗_{M₂} L y
      := #L((η x ⊗^{M₁} η y)
            · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
         · ε _.

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax
       (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)) x y =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax
       (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)) x y =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
   · # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y))

        apply idpath.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x)) (R (L y))
· # L (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x)) (R (L y))
· # L (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
adjcounit A (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} adjcounit A (L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (L x) (L y) =
ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

        apply id_right.

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_tensor

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· (# L
     (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
   · ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)) =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# L
  (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y =
identity (left_adjoint A (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· (# L (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y)
   · # L
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
   · ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)) =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)

pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y)
· # L (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ?b

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
?b =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

· # L (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y)
· # L (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)

pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L
    (η x ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} functor_identity C₁ y
     · (L ∙ R) x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} η y) = ?y'

          
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L (η x ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} y · R (L x) ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} η y) =
?y'

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# (left_functor A) (η x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} left_functor A y
· (left_functor A (R (L x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # (left_functor A) (η y)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)))
· # L (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# (left_functor A) (η x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} left_functor A y
· (left_functor A (R (L x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # (left_functor A) (η y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
        (R (L y))
      · (# L
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x)
              (L y)) · ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)))) =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# (left_functor A) (η x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} left_functor A y
· (left_functor A (R (L x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # (left_functor A) (η y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
        (R (L y))
      · (# L
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x)
              (L y)) · ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)))) = ?b

?b =

  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # (left_functor A) (η y)
· ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

          apply bifunctor_distributes_over_comp ; apply M₂.
        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
(# (left_functor A) (η x) · ε (L x))
⊗^{ M₂} (# (left_functor A) (η y) · ε (L y)) =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)

  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
(# (left_functor A) (η x) · ε (L x))
⊗^{ M₂} (# (left_functor A) (η y) · ε (L y)) = ?b

  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
identity (left_functor A x)
⊗^{ M₂} identity (left_functor A y) =
identity (left_adjoint A x ⊗_{ M₂} left_adjoint A y)

        apply bifunctor_distributes_over_id ; apply M₂.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# L
  (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y =
identity (left_adjoint A (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# L
  (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· (ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y) =
identity (left_adjoint A (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# L
  (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· (ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
?b = identity (left_adjoint A (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

A: adjunction C₁ C₂

pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y = ?t2

          
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
?t2 =
ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y

          apply (nat_trans_ax ε).
        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# L
  (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· (# (R ∙ L) (pr1 HL x y)
   · ε (pr1 (left_adjoint A) (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))) =
identity (left_adjoint A (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

# L
  (η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (pr1 HL x y) = ?t2

          exact (!pη).
        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
x, y: C₁
pη: η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y)
· # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)
pε: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
  (R (L y))
· # L
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HR (L x) (L y))
· ε (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) = ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
# L (η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))
· ε (pr1 (left_functor A) (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
identity (left_functor A (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

        apply (triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction A).
    Qed.
  End PreservesTensor.

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L

  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
is_inverse_in_precat (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) ?g

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
C₂ ⟦ L I_{ M₁}, I_{ M₂} ⟧
 exact is_strong_left_adjoint_on_unit.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HA: monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
HL:= fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
HR:= fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
Hη:= monoidal_adjunit HA: is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
  (adjunit A)
Hε:= monoidal_adjcounit HA: is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
is_inverse_in_precat (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)
  is_strong_left_adjoint_on_unit
 exact is_strong_left_adjoint_on_unit_laws.
  Defined.
End LeftAdjointStrong.

(**
 4. If the left adjoint is strong, then the adjunction is monoidal
 *)
Section MonoidalAdjunctionFromStrong.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
          {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
          {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
          (L := left_adjoint A : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (R := right_adjoint A : C₂ ⟶ C₁)
          (η := adjunit A : functor_identity _ ⟹ L ∙ R)
          (ε := adjcounit A : R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity _)
          (HL : fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L).

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_data M₂ M₁ R

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_data M₂ M₁ R

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
preserves_tensordata M₂ M₁ R
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
(λ _ : preserves_tensordata M₂ M₁ R,
 preserves_unit M₂ M₁ R) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₂
C₁ ⟦ R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y, R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⟧

      exact (η _
             · #R (inv_from_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
                   · (ε x ⊗^{M₂} ε y))).
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
(λ _ : preserves_tensordata M₂ M₁ R,
 preserves_unit M₂ M₁ R)
  ((λ x y : C₂,
    η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · # R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
              (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
   :
   preserves_tensordata M₂ M₁ R)
 exact (η _ · #R (inv_from_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))).
  Defined.

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

  right_adjoint_monoidal_data_from_strong

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₂)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y₂),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)) =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₁)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁)
· # R (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₂)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y₂),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
?b =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₁)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁)
· # R (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g)

g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₂)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g · η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₂)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g · η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₂) = ?y'

        exact (nat_trans_ax η _ _ (R x ⊗^{M₁}_{l} # R g)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· # (L ∙ R) (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂) =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₁)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁)
· # R (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g)

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· (# (L ∙ R) (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y₂),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)) =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y₁)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁)
   · # R (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· (# R (# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y₂),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)) =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y₁)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁)
   · # R (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· # R
    (# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
     · (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y₂),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)) =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y₁)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₁)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁ · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₁))
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁ · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₁))
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁ · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g =
# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₁))
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁ · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g = ?b

g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
?b =
# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,

· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁ · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g = ?b

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,

M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂

η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₁ · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} g = ?t2

          exact (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M₂ x g).

          apply bifunctor_distributes_over_comp ; apply M₂.

ε x = ?y'

          exact (!(id_left (ε x))).

⊗^{ M₂} (# (R ∙ L) g · ε y₂) = ?t2

x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity ((R ∙ L) x) ⊗^{ M₂} # (R ∙ L) g
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂ = ?t2

M₁: monoidal C₁
