HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (L (R x)) ⊗^{ M₂} # L (# R g)
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂ = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (L (R x)) ⊗^{ M₂} # L (# R g) = ?y'

        exact (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M₂ _ _).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₁))
· (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂) =
# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R y₂)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₁))
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂ =
# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₂))
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y₂

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₁))
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g) =
# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₂))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁)
· (# L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y₂)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁)
· # L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y₂))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁)
· # L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g) =
L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (# R g)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₂) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y₁)
· # L (R x ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} # R g)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft.
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
preserves_tensor_nat_right
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     right_adjoint_monoidal_data_from_strong)
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y
· (η (R x₂ ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂)
             (R y),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂)
             (R y)) · ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) =
η (R x₁ ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₁)
          (R y)) · ε x₁ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)
· # R (f ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y)

             (R y)) · ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) = ?b

f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y),,

        (R y)) · ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y),,

· ε x₁ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y · f ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y

f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y),,

· ε x₁ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y · f ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y =

· (inv_from_z_iso

      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂)

          apply bifunctor_distributes_over_comp ; apply M₂.

f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
(ε x₁ · f) ⊗^{ M₂} (ε y · identity y) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
(ε x₁ · f) ⊗^{ M₂} (ε y · identity y) = ?b

⊗^{ M₂} (identity ((R ∙ L) y) · ε y) = ?b

          apply bifunctor_distributes_over_comp ; apply M₂.

· ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y = ?t2

x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂} identity (L (R y))
· ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y = ?t2

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂} identity (L (R y)) = ?y'

        exact (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M₂ _ _).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₁) (R y))
· (# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) =
# L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂)
        (R y)) · ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₁) (R y))
· # L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y =
# L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂) (R y))
· ε x₂ ⊗^{ M₂} ε y

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₁) (R y))
· # L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) =
# L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂) (R y))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y)
· (# L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂)
          (R y)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y)
· # L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x₂) (R y))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y)
· # L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y) =
# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x₁, x₂, y: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R f) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₂) (R y) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x₁) (R y)
· # L (# R f ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R y)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatright.
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
preserves_associativity
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     right_adjoint_monoidal_data_from_strong)
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} 
R z
· (η (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
        · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
        · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} 
R z · η (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} 
R z · η (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} 
R z · η (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} 
R z · η (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z) = ?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax η _ _ (_ ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} _)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
η ((R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # (L ∙ R)
    ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
      · # R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
η ((R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # (L ∙ R)
    ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
      · # R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
η ((R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # (L ∙ R)
    ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
      · # R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· R x
  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         HL (R y) (R z),,
                       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         HL (R y) (R z))
                    · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax η _ _ (_ · (_ ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} _))).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
η (pr1 M₁ (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· # (L ∙ R)
    (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
     · R x
       ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                    · # R
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                              HL (R y) (R z),,
                            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                              HL (R y) (R z))
                         · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
η ((R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # (L ∙ R)
    ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
      · # R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
     · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
· # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
η (pr1 M₁ (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (# (L ∙ R)
     (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
      · R x
        ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                     · # R
                         (inv_from_z_iso
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                               HL (R y) (R z),,
                             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               HL (R y) (R z))
                          · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
        · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) =
η ((R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· (# (L ∙ R)
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · # R
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R y),,
               fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                 (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
   · (# R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
              (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
              (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
         · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# (L ∙ R)
  (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
   · R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            HL (R y) (R z),,
                          fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            HL (R y) (R z))
                       · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
# (L ∙ R)
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · # R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
              (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
   · # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# R
  (# L
     (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
      · R x
        ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                     · # R
                         (inv_from_z_iso
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                               HL (R y) (R z),,
                             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               HL (R y) (R z))
                          · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
     · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
# R
  (# L
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · # R
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R y),,
               fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                 (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z))
· (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
   · # R α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# R
  (# L
     (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
      · R x
        ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                     · # R
                         (inv_from_z_iso
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                               HL (R y) (R z),,
                             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               HL (R y) (R z))
                          · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
           (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) =
# R
  (# L
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · # R
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R y),,
               fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                 (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L
  (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
   · R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            HL (R y) (R z),,
                          fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            HL (R y) (R z))
                       · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · # R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
              (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L
  (α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
   · R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            HL (R y) (R z),,
                          fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            HL (R y) (R z))
                       · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · # R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
              (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · (# R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                             HL (R y) (R z),,
                           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                             HL (R y) (R z)))
                     · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · (# R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                             HL (R y) (R z),,
                           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                             HL (R y) (R z)))
                     · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z}
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · (# R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                             HL (R y) (R z),,
                           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                             HL (R y) (R z)))
                     · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L α^{ M₁ }_{ R x, R y, R z} = ?y'

        apply (strong_fmonoidal_preserves_associativity HL).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R y)
                (R z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
    (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · (# R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                             HL (R y) (R z),,
                           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                             HL (R y) (R z)))
                     · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
            · (# L
                 (R x
                  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                               · (# R
                                    (inv_from_z_iso
                                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                          HL (R y)
                                          (R z),,
                                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                          HL (R y)
                                          (R z)))
                                  · # R
                                      (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
               · (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       HL (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
                  · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))))) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
            · (# L
                 (R x
                  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                               · (# R
                                    (inv_from_z_iso
                                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                          HL (R y)
                                          (R z),,
                                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                          HL (R y)
                                          (R z)))
                                  · # R
                                      (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
               · (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       HL (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
                  · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
            · (# L
                 (R x
                  ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                               · (# R
                                    (inv_from_z_iso
                                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                          HL (R y)
                                          (R z),,
                                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                          HL (R y)
                                          (R z)))
                                  · # R
                                      (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
               · (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       HL (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
                  · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))))) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
  (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· (# L
     (R x
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                   · (# R
                        (inv_from_z_iso
                           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                              HL (R y) (R z),,
                            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                              HL (R y) (R z)))
                      · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
           (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
  (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            HL (R y) (R z),,
                          fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            HL (R y) (R z)))
                  · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
       (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
       (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
  (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            HL (R y) (R z),,
                          fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            HL (R y) (R z)))
                  · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))) = ?y'

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?y' =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
  (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            HL (R y) (R z),,
                          fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            HL (R y) (R z)))
                  · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))

        apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft HL).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (L (R x)
            ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L
                          (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                           · # R
                               (inv_from_z_iso
                                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                     HL (R y) (R z),,
                                   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                     HL (R y) (R z)))
                           · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))
            · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
            · inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                   (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                 fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                   (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
            · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (L (R x)
            ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L
                          (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                           · (# R
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                      HL (R y) (R z),,
                                    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                      HL (R y) (R z)))
                              · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
            · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
               · (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       HL (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
                  · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))))) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (L (R x)
            ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L
                          (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                           · (# R
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                      HL (R y) (R z),,
                                    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                      HL (R y) (R z)))
                              · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
            · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
               · (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       HL (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
                  · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)

                       (R y) (R z)
         · (L (R x)
            ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L
                          (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)
                           · (# R
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                      HL (R y) (R z),,
                                    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                      HL (R y) (R z)))
                              · # R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)))
            · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))
               · (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       HL (R x) (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
                  · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))))) =
?b

     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?t2

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, _)).

· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?t2

        apply id_left.

     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,

   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)

            · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (# L (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z))
             · (# L
                  (# R
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                           HL (R y) (R z),,
                         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                           HL (R y) (R z))))
                · # L (# R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?t2

                · # L (# R (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z))))

L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (# L (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z))
             · # L

          apply (nat_trans_ax ε).

x, y, z: C₂
# L (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z))
· (ε (L (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z))
   · # (functor_identity C₂)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R y)
             (R z),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R y)
             (R z)) · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)) = ?t2

· (ε (L (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z))
   · (inv_from_z_iso

         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R y)

HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L (η (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)) · ε (L (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z)) =
?y'0

          apply (triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction A).
        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
identity (left_functor A (R y ⊗_{ M₁} R z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R y) (R z),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R y) (R z)) =
?y'

        apply id_left.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (L (R x)
            ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (inv_from_z_iso
                           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                              HL (R y) (R z),,
                            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                              HL (R y) (R z))
                         · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
            · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)
         · (L (R x)
            ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (inv_from_z_iso
                           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                              HL (R y) (R z),,
                            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                              HL (R y) (R z))
                         · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
            · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x)
         ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                       (R y) (R z)

                              HL (R y) (R z),,
                            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                              HL (R y) (R z))
                         · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
            · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))))) = 
?b

              (R z)
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
                     (R y) (R z),,

                     HL (R y) (R z)) · ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?t2

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     (R z),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y) (R z))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
      · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
         · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))) =
# L
  ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
    · (# R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
   · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
  (R z)
· (# L
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · (# R
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                  (R y),,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                  (R x) (R y)))
          · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
         · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
  (R z)
· (# L
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · (# R
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                  (R y),,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                  (R x) (R y)))
          · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
         · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
  (R z)
· (# L
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · (# R
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                  (R y),,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                  (R x) (R y)))
          · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
         · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

  (R z)
· (# L
     ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
       · (# R
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                  (R y),,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                  (R x) (R y)))
          · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
      · (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
         · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}))) = ?b

    ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
      · # R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,

       (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =

  (R z)

      · # R

     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z) = ?y'

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x, y, z: C₂
?y' =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
  (R z)
· # L
    ((η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
      · # R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R z)

        apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatright HL).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L
  (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y))
    (R z)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
       (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
       (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) (R z))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

   · (# R

           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)

     (R z)

   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, _)).

identity (L (R (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R z))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z = ?y'

        apply id_left.

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
# L
  (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
   · (# R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
              (R y),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
              (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}) =
?b

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R y),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) · ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂} ε z
· α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} = ?b

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
identity (left_functor A (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y)) =

        apply id_left.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
 · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
 · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
 · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
 · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) = ?y'

        apply (bifunctor_rightcomp M₂).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂} ε z)
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
                · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
                · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
                · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
                · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?b

α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
               · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?b

· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
               · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z) = ?y'

· L (R x)

               · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z) = ?b

x, y, z: C₂
?b = ?y'

· L (R x)

L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
             · y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z) = ?t2

          apply (bifunctor_leftcomp M₂).

α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z))
   · L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)) = ?y'

M₂: monoidal C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z))
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z) = ?y'

M₂: monoidal C₂
