L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), L (R y), L (R z)}
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (ε y ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)) = 
?y'

        apply monoidal_associatornatleftright.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, L (R z)}
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) = ?b

x, y, z: C₂
?b =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, L (R z)}
   · (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
      · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z))) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, L (R z)}
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z)
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?b

          
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, L (R z)}
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z) = ?y'

          apply monoidal_associatornatleft.
        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, z}
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, z}
   · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z)) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
α^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x), y, z}
· ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M₂} z) = ?t2

        apply monoidal_associatornatright.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
   · ((ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
      · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})) =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z · α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z})

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
· α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z} =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) · (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· α^{ M₂ }_{ x, y, z}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) · (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) · (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z =
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) · (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) · (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z =
?b

M₂: monoidal C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z) = ?y'

        apply (bifunctor_rightcomp M₂).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z =
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

M₂: monoidal C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z =
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

      
C₁, C₂: category

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
   · (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z) =
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· ((L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
   · (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z)

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· ((x ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
   · (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z) =
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· ((L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
   · (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z)

x, y, z: C₂
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R z)
· (x ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z =
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
· (x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z =
(L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε z
· (L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

· ((L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
?b =
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z
· (ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

        apply (bifunctor_rightcomp M₂).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
(L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z =
(ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} z

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y · ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} y =
ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y, z: C₂
ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y =
ε x ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R y) · x ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε y

      apply idpath.
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
preserves_leftunitality
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     right_adjoint_monoidal_data_from_strong)
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit
     right_adjoint_monoidal_data_from_strong)
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x
· (η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
        · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)) · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
# L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x
· (η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
        · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)) · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
# L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
p:= fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality HL (R x): fmonoidal_preservesunit HL ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

p:= fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality HL (R x): fmonoidal_preservesunit HL ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))

  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

· (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
   · # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x})

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
identity (L (I_{ M₁} ⊗_{ M₁} R x))

· fmonoidal_preservesunit HL ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)

(inv_from_z_iso
   (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
    fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
 · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
p:= fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality HL (R x): fmonoidal_preservesunit HL ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
?b = ?t2

          apply bifunctor_rightid.

M₂: monoidal C₂

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
p:= fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality HL (R x): fmonoidal_preservesunit HL ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))
· identity (L I_{ M₁} ⊗_{ M₂} L (R x))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x) =
identity (L (I_{ M₁} ⊗_{ M₁} R x))

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x
· (η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
        · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)) · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}

q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x
· (η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
        · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)) · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · identity (R x)

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x
· (η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
   · # R

          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
        · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)) · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
· (adjunit A (right_functor A x)
   · # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x · η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R I_{ M₂})
          (R x),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R I_{ M₂}) (R x)) · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)
· # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · adjunit A (right_functor A x)
· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x)

            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
              (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
         · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x) · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x})) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
?b =
η (I_{ M₁} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
· (# (L ∙ R) lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
   · # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x))

    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,

  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x
· (η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
   · (# R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL

        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x · η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R I_{ M₂})
          (R x),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (R I_{ M₂}) (R x)) · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)
· # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} = ?b

x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))

     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

(η I_{ M₁}
 · # R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x · η (R I_{ M₂} ⊗_{ M₁} R x) = ?y'

        exact (nat_trans_ax η _ _ ((η I_{ M₁} · # R _) ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x)).

     (R x))

η (functor_identity C₁ I_{ M₁} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
· # (L ∙ R)
    ((η I_{ M₁}
      · # R

          (R I_{ M₂}) (R x)) · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)
· # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
η (I_{ M₁} ⊗_{ M₁} R x)
· (# (L ∙ R) lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
   · # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x))

x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# R

       · # R

      ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x))

           (R I_{ M₂}) (R x)) · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂} ε x)
   · # R lu^{ M₂ }_{ x}) =
# R (# L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x})
· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x)

     (R x))

      · lu^{ M₂ }_{ x})) =
# (right_functor A)
  (# L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · adjcounit A x)

· (inv_from_z_iso

      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
   · (lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · adjcounit A x))

    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε x · lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· (I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε x · lu^{ M₂ }_{ x}) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε x · lu^{ M₂ }_{ x} = ?t2

        apply monoidal_leftunitornat.
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  ((η I_{ M₁}
    · # R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
            fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R I_{ M₂})
        (R x),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R I_{ M₂})
        (R x))
   · (ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
      · (lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · ε x))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
   · (lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · adjcounit A x))

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,

     (R x))

    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  ((η I_{ M₁}
    · # R

            fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R I_{ M₂})
       (R x),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R I_{ M₂})
       (R x)) · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · ε x =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁} (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
· adjcounit A x

     (R x))

     (R x))

⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))

    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x)
· # L

      · # R

       (R x),,

       (R x)) · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) = ?b

     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
?b =

  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)

     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x) = ?y'

      · # R

             (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,

     ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} R x)

        apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatright.

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (η I_{ M₁}
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R I_{ M₂}) (R x)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R I_{ M₂})
           (R x),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
           (R I_{ M₂}) (R x))
      · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x)

      · ε I_{ M₂} ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x))) = ?b

            fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
   · ε I_{ M₂}) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L lu^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL I_{ M₁} (R x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL I_{ M₁}
     (R x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L (R x) · lu^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
· ε I_{ M₂} = ?t2

        apply (nat_trans_ax ε).

# L (η I_{ M₁})
· (ε (L I_{ M₁})
   · # (functor_identity C₂)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

x: C₂
R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂})
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂}),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}))
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} = ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x}

HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL = 
?y'

M₂: monoidal C₂

L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x: C₂
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) I_{ M₁})
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                  fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
   · L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL) =
?y'

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) I_{ M₁})
· identity (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L I_{ M₁})
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁} =
identity (L (R x ⊗_{ M₁} I_{ M₁}))

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂})
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂}),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}))
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} = ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂})
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂}),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}))
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · identity (R x)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂})
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂}),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
             (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}))
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
· (adjunit A (right_functor A x)
   · # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂})
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂}),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂})
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · adjunit A (right_functor A x)
· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x)

M₂: monoidal C₂

                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly

R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}

                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly

· # R

       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂}),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂})
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x}

· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x) = ?b

          (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂})
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂})
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂}),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂})
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} I_{ M₁}) · # (L ∙ R) ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x)

      · # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x})) =

· (# (L ∙ R) ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
   · # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x))

R x
⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
             · # R

                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       HL)))
· η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R I_{ M₂}) = ?y'

        exact (nat_trans_ax η _ _ (R x ⊗^{M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁} · # R _))).

A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} functor_identity C₁ I_{ M₁})
· # (L ∙ R)
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                          fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                            HL))))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂}),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂})
· # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x} =
η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} I_{ M₁})
· (# (L ∙ R) ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x}
   · # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x))

           (R I_{ M₂}),,

· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x)

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# R
  (# L
     (R x
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                   · # R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                             HL)))))
· (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂}),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂})
   · # R ru^{ M₂ }_{ x}) =
# R (# L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x})
· # (right_functor A) (adjcounit A x)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# R
  (# L
     (R x
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                   · # R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                             HL))))
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂}),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}
      · ru^{ M₂ }_{ x})) =
# (right_functor A)
  (# L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · adjcounit A x)

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (R x
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                · # R
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                          HL))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}
   · ru^{ M₂ }_{ x}) =
# L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · adjcounit A x

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (R x
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                · # R
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                          HL))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}
   · ru^{ M₂ }_{ x}) =
# L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} · adjcounit A x

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (R x
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                · # R
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                          HL))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂})) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂}
   · ru^{ M₂ }_{ x}) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
· ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · adjcounit A x

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (R x
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                · # R
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                          HL))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}))
   · (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂} · ru^{ M₂ }_{ x})) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) I_{ M₁})
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                  fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
   · (ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · adjcounit A x))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (R x
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                · # R
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                          HL))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}))
   · (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε I_{ M₂} · ru^{ M₂ }_{ x})) = ?b

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
?b =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) I_{ M₁})
· (L (R x)
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                  fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
   · (ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)} · adjcounit A x))

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L
  (R x
   ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                · # R
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                          HL))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
        (R I_{ M₂}),,

· (L (R x)

     I_{ M₁})

  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso

· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· (# L
     (R x
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                   · # R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                             HL))))
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂}),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂}))
      · L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂}))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· (# L
     (R x
      ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                   · # R
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                             HL))))
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂}),,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
           (R I_{ M₂}))
      · L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂})) =
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

· inv_from_z_iso

       (R I_{ M₂}),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
       (R I_{ M₂})) · L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂} =
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
?y' =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L
    (R x
     ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} (η I_{ M₁}
                  · # R
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                          fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                            HL))))

        apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft.

A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R I_{ M₂})
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
       (R I_{ M₂}),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
       (R I_{ M₂})) = ?y'

        apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, _)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L
              (η I_{ M₁}
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                       fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                         HL)))
· (identity (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R I_{ M₂}))
   · L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂}) =
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L
              (η I_{ M₁}
               · # R
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                       fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                         HL)))
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂} =
L (R x)
⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

M₂: monoidal C₂

     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)

                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,

· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
L (R x)

               · # R

                      (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                       fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                         HL)))
· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂} = ?b

· L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} ε I_{ M₂}

        apply (bifunctor_leftcomp M₂).

               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}

· # L
    (# R
       (inv_from_z_iso

           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))

  (# R

         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
· ε I_{ M₂} = ?t2

        apply (nat_trans_ax ε).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L (η I_{ M₁})
· (ε (L I_{ M₁})
   · # (functor_identity C₂)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,

  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso

                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L (η I_{ M₁}) · ε (L I_{ M₁})
· # (functor_identity C₂)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L (η I_{ M₁}) · ε (L I_{ M₁})
· # (functor_identity C₂)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)) =
identity (L I_{ M₁})
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L (η I_{ M₁}) · ε (L I_{ M₁})
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL) =
identity (L I_{ M₁})
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x: C₂
q: # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁},,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
     I_{ M₁})
· L (R x)
  ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} inv_from_z_iso
                (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
                 fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                   HL) · ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
p:= fmonoidal_preservesrightunitality HL (R x): L (R x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) I_{ M₁}
· # L ru^{ M₁ }_{ R x} = ru^{ M₂ }_{ L (R x)}
# L (η I_{ M₁}) · ε (L I_{ M₁}) = identity (L I_{ M₁})

      apply (triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction A).
  Qed.

  Definition right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong
    : fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ R
    := right_adjoint_monoidal_data_from_strong
       ,,
       right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong_laws.

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HL
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong) η

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HL
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong) η

C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
identity (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) · η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· (η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
             (R (L y)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
        · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y))
   · # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· (η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
             (R (L y)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
        · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y))
   · # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y))

x, y: C₁
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· (η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
   · (# R
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
              (R (L y)),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
              (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
         · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y))
      · # R (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)))

x, y: C₁
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) =
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· (η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
             (R (L y)),,

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y
· (η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
             (R (L y)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
        · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
        · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y)) =
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y · η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y) =
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)

x, y: C₁
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y · η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category

A: adjunction C₁ C₂

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
?b = η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)

x, y: C₁
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y · η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y))
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
η x ⊗^{ M₁} η y · η (R (L x) ⊗_{ M₁} R (L y)) = ?y'

        exact (nat_trans_ax η _ _ (adjunit A x ⊗^{M₁} adjunit A y)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
η
  (functor_identity C₁ x ⊗_{ M₁} functor_identity C₁ y)
· # (L ∙ R) (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y) =
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)

M₂: monoidal C₂

η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
η
  (functor_identity C₁ x ⊗_{ M₁} functor_identity C₁ y)
· (# (L ∙ R) (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
             (R (L y)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
        · (ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
           · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y))) =
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)

x, y: C₁
η
  (functor_identity C₁ x ⊗_{ M₁} functor_identity C₁ y)
· (# (L ∙ R) (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
   · # R
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
             (R (L y)),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
        · (ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
           · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y))) =
η (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) · identity (R (L (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)))

        (R (L y)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))

identity (L (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y =
identity (L (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL x y)
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL x y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL x y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL x y)
· identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) =
# L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· (# L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y))

x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· (# L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y)),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
          (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)) =
identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))

    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) = ?b

    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))

       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) = ?b

fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁} adjunit A y) = ?y'

fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L
    (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} y
     · (pr12 A) (pr1 A x) ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} adjunit A y) =
?y'

x, y: C₁
?y'0 =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL x y
· # L (adjunit A x ⊗^{ M₁}_{r} y)

          apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatright HL).

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
    ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) y
· # L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x) ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} adjunit A y) =
?y'

x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
     ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) y
   · # L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x) ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} adjunit A y)) =
?y'

M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
  y · # L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x) ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} adjunit A y) =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
?t2 =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
  y · # L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x) ⊗^{ M₁}_{l} adjunit A y)

        apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft HL).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· (L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
       ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) =
identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· (L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y))
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
              (R (L y)),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
              (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
         · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)))) =
identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· (L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y))
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
              (R (L y)),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
              (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
         · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)))) = ?b

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂

x, y: C₁
?b = identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y))
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
              (R (L y)),,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
              (R (L x)) (R (L y)))
         · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)))) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category

M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
  ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
        (R (L y)),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
        (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
  ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
  ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y)),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R (L x))
       (R (L y))) = ?y'

        apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL _ _)).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· (L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
   · (identity
        (L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
         ⊗_{ M₂} L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A y)))
      · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y))) =
identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· (L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x))
   ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
   · ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)) =
identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

x, y: C₁
# L (adjunit A x) ⊗^{ M₂}_{r} L y
· L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
· ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) = identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

· L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
· ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y) = ?b

x, y: C₁
?b = identity (L x ⊗_{ M₂} L y)

· L ((pr12 A) (pr1 A x)) ⊗^{ M₂}_{l} # L (adjunit A y)
· ε (L x) ⊗^{ M₂} ε (L y)

        apply bifunctor_distributes_over_comp ; apply M₂.

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HL
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong) η
 
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
identity I_{ M₁} · η I_{ M₁} =
η I_{ M₁}
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))
· # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)

η I_{ M₁} =
η I_{ M₁}
· # R
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))
· # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)

· (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,

   · # R (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL))

identity (R (L I_{ M₁})) =

# R (identity (L I_{ M₁})) =

   · fmonoidal_preservesunit HL)

· fmonoidal_preservesunit HL

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit HL = identity (L I_{ M₁})

      apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
  Qed.

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong HL)
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) ε
