C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y)
· # L
    (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     · # R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) =
ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y · identity (x ⊗_{ M₂} y)

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y)
· # L
    (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     · # R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
               (R y),,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
               (R x) (R y)) · ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) = ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y)
· # L
    (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y)
     · (# R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                (R y),,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                (R x) (R y))) · # R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y)))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) = ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
x, y: C₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y)
· (# L (η (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y))
   · (# L
        (# R
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x)
                 (R y),,
               fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
                 (R x) (R y))))
      · # L (# R (ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y))))
· ε (x ⊗_{ M₂} y) = ε x ⊗^{ M₂} ε y

· (identity (left_functor A (R x ⊗_{ M₁} R y))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (R x) (R y),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x)
          (R y))) = identity (L (R x) ⊗_{ M₂} L (R y))

     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL (R x) (R y)) =

      apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, _)).

R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong HL)
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) ε
 
C₁, C₂: category

M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· # L
    (η I_{ M₁}
     · # R
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
             fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
· ε I_{ M₂} = identity I_{ M₂}

· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · # L
       (# R
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
              fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))))
· ε I_{ M₂} = identity I_{ M₂}

               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
      · ε I_{ M₂})) = identity I_{ M₂}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · (# L
        (# R
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
      · ε I_{ M₂})) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
?b = identity I_{ M₂}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · (# L
        (# R
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
      · ε I_{ M₂})) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
# L
  (# R
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))
· ε I_{ M₂} = ?t2

        apply (nat_trans_ax ε).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · (ε (L I_{ M₁})
      · # (functor_identity C₂)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
              fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)))) =
identity I_{ M₂}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · (ε (L I_{ M₁})
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))) =
identity I_{ M₂}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · (ε (L I_{ M₁})
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
?b = identity I_{ M₂}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (# L (η I_{ M₁})
   · (ε (L I_{ M₁})
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL))) = 
?b

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
# L (η I_{ M₁})
· (ε (L I_{ M₁})
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
# L (η I_{ M₁}) · ε (L I_{ M₁})
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
# L (η I_{ M₁}) · ε (L I_{ M₁}) = ?y'

        apply (triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction A).
      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· (identity (left_functor A I_{ M₁})
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)) =
identity I_{ M₂}

      
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_preservesunit HL
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit HL,,
     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL) =
identity I_{ M₂}

      exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
               (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly HL)).
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A

  
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax ?HL ?HR) (adjunit A)
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal_lax ?HR ?HL)
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)

    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ (left_adjoint A)
 exact HL.
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₁ (right_adjoint A)
 exact right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong.
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans (identity_fmonoidal M₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HL
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong) (adjunit A)
 exact monoidal_adjunction_from_strong_unit.
    
C₁, C₂: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
A: adjunction C₁ C₂
L:= left_adjoint A: C₁ ⟶ C₂
R:= right_adjoint A: C₂ ⟶ C₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
HL: fmonoidal M₁ M₂ L
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     right_adjoint_monoidal_from_strong HL)
  (identity_fmonoidal M₂) (adjcounit A)
 exact monoidal_adjunction_from_strong_counit.
  Defined.
End MonoidalAdjunctionFromStrong.

(**
 5. Symmetric monoidal adjunctions
 *)
Definition is_sym_monoidal_adjunction
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
           {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
           (S₁ : symmetric M₁)
           (S₂ : symmetric M₂)
           {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
           (HA : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A)
  : UU
  := is_symmetric_monoidal_functor S₁ S₂ (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     ×
     is_symmetric_monoidal_functor S₂ S₁ (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA).

Definition sym_monoidal_adjunction
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
           {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
           (S₁ : symmetric M₁)
           (S₂ : symmetric M₂)
           (A : adjunction C₁ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∑ (HA : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A), is_sym_monoidal_adjunction S₁ S₂ HA.

(**
 6. Accessors
 *)
Section SymMonoidalAdjunctionAccessors.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
          {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
          {S₁ : symmetric M₁}
          {S₂ : symmetric M₂}
          {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
          (L := left_adjoint A : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (R := right_adjoint A : C₂ ⟶ C₁)
          (η := adjunit A)
          (ε := adjcounit A)
          {HA : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A}
          (HAA : is_sym_monoidal_adjunction S₁ S₂ HA).

  Definition is_symmetric_monoidal_functor_left_adjoint
    : is_symmetric_monoidal_functor S₁ S₂ (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
    := pr1 HAA.

  Definition is_symmetric_monoidal_functor_right_adjoint
    : is_symmetric_monoidal_functor S₂ S₁ (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
    := pr2 HAA.
End SymMonoidalAdjunctionAccessors.

Coercion sym_monoidal_adjunction_to_monoidal_adjunction
         {C₁ C₂ : category}
         {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
         {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
         {S₁ : symmetric M₁}
         {S₂ : symmetric M₂}
         {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
         (HA : sym_monoidal_adjunction S₁ S₂ A)
  : monoidal_adjunction M₁ M₂ A
  := pr1 HA.

Coercion sym_monoidal_adjunction_to_is_symmetric
         {C₁ C₂ : category}
         {M₁ : monoidal C₁}
         {M₂ : monoidal C₂}
         {S₁ : symmetric M₁}
         {S₂ : symmetric M₂}
         {A : adjunction C₁ C₂}
         (HA : sym_monoidal_adjunction S₁ S₂ A)
  : is_sym_monoidal_adjunction S₁ S₂ HA
  := pr2 HA.

(**
 7. Symmetric monoidal adjunctions from strong functors
 *)
Section SymMonoidalAdjunctionFromStrong.
  Context {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
          {A : adjunction V₁ V₂}
          (L := left_adjoint A : V₁ ⟶ V₂)
          (R := right_adjoint A : V₂ ⟶ V₁)
          (η := adjunit A : functor_identity _ ⟹ L ∙ R)
          (ε := adjcounit A : R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity _)
          (HL : fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L)
          (HHL : is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL).

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
is_sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂
  (monoidal_adjunction_from_strong HL)

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
is_sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂
  (monoidal_adjunction_from_strong HL)

    
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint
     (monoidal_adjunction_from_strong HL))
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₂ V₁
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint
     (monoidal_adjunction_from_strong HL))

    
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint
     (monoidal_adjunction_from_strong HL))
 exact HHL.
    
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₂ V₁
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint
     (monoidal_adjunction_from_strong HL))
 
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)
· (adjunit A
     (right_functor A y ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A x)
   · # (right_functor A)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
             (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
             (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))
        · adjcounit A y ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A x)) =
adjunit A
  (right_functor A x ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A y)
· # (right_functor A)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
     · adjcounit A x ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A y)
· # (right_functor A) (pr1 V₂ x y)

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)
· adjunit A
    (right_functor A y ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A x)
· # (right_functor A)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))
     · adjcounit A y ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A x) =
adjunit A
  (right_functor A x ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A y)
· # (right_functor A)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
     · adjcounit A x ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A y)
· # (right_functor A) (pr1 V₂ x y)

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)
· adjunit A
    (right_functor A y ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A x)
· # (right_functor A)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))
     · adjcounit A y ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A x) = ?b
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
?b =
adjunit A
  (right_functor A x ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A y)
· # (right_functor A)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
     · adjcounit A x ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A y)
· # (right_functor A) (pr1 V₂ x y)

x, y: V₂
pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)
· adjunit A
    (right_functor A y ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A x)
· # (right_functor A)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL

x, y: V₂

· adjunit A
    (right_functor A y ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A x) =
?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax η).

· # (L ∙ R)

          (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
     · adjcounit A x ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A y)
· # (right_functor A) (pr1 V₂ x y)

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
     (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V₂
     (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
     (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
   · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (adjcounit A y)
       (adjcounit A x)) =
# (left_functor A)
  (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
        (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
        (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))
   · adjcounit A y ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A x)

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂

HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
     (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· sym_mon_braiding V₂
    (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
    (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (adjcounit A y)
    (adjcounit A x) =
# (left_functor A)
  (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
       (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
       (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))
· adjcounit A y ⊗^{ V₂} adjcounit A x

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂

   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL

    (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
    (left_functor A (right_functor A y)) =

  (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))

    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
sym_mon_braiding V₂
  (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
  (left_functor A (right_functor A y)) =
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A x)
   (right_functor A y),,
 fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
   (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· (# (left_functor A)
     (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
          (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
          (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x)))

A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂

ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂

HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
sym_mon_braiding V₂
  (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
  (left_functor A (right_functor A y)) =
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A x)
   (right_functor A y),,
 fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
   (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· # (left_functor A)
    (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
       (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
       (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A x)
   (right_functor A y),,
 fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
   (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))
· # (left_functor A)
    (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V₂
  (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
  (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL
     (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x),,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly HL
     (right_functor A y) (right_functor A x))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)) =
(pr12 V₂) (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
  (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A y)
    (right_functor A x)

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
L:= left_adjoint A: V₁ ⟶ V₂
R:= right_adjoint A: V₂ ⟶ V₁
η:= adjunit A: functor_identity V₁ ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= adjcounit A: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity V₂
HL: fmonoidal V₁ V₂ L
HHL: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂ HL
x, y: V₂
(pr12 V₂) (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
  (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A y)
    (right_functor A x) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HL (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (pr1 V₁ (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y))

      apply HHL.
  Qed.

  Definition sym_monoidal_adjunction_from_strong
    : sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
    := _ ,, is_sym_monoidal_adjunction_from_strong.
End SymMonoidalAdjunctionFromStrong.

(**
 8. Symmetric monoidal adjunctions to comonads
 *)

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (δ (Comonad_from_adjunction A))


V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (δ (Comonad_from_adjunction A))

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_functor A)))

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_functor A)))

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker

     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)

A: adjunction V₁ V₂

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
x, y: V₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)) x y
· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
    (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
       (left_functor A)) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y) =
whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
  (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
     (left_functor A)) x
⊗^{ V₂} whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
          (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
             (left_functor A)) y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))) x y

     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)) x y
· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
    (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)

fmonoidal_preservestensordata

· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂

x, y: V₂
whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
  (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
     (left_adjoint A)) x
⊗^{ V₂} whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
          (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
             (left_adjoint A)) y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (comp_fmonoidal_lax
             (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
             (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))) x y =
whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
  (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
     (left_functor A)) x
⊗^{ V₂} whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
          (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax

          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))) x y

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)) x y
· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
    (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)

· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
x, y: V₂
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA) (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A)
       (pr1 (right_functor A) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y))) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA) (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (identity
       (right_functor A x ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A y))
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A)
       (pr1 (right_functor A) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y)))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A

  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)

        (left_adjoint A)))

fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA) (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A)
       (pr1 (right_functor A) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y))) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA) (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· identity
    (left_functor A
       (right_functor A x ⊗_{ V₁} right_functor A y))
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A)
       (pr1 (right_functor A) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y)))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker

  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA) (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A)
       (pr1 (right_functor A) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y))) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA) (right_functor A x)
  (right_functor A y)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A)
       (pr1 (right_functor A) (x ⊗_{ V₂} y)))

      apply idpath.
    
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
x, y: V₂
whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
  (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
     (left_adjoint A)) x
⊗^{ V₂} whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
          (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
             (left_adjoint A)) y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (comp_fmonoidal_lax
             (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
             (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))) x y =
whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
  (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
     (left_functor A)) x
⊗^{ V₂} whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
          (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
             (left_functor A)) y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
       (comp_fmonoidal_lax
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))) x y
 
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
x, y: V₂
# (pr1 (left_functor A))
  (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) x))
⊗^{ V₂} # (pr1 (left_functor A))
          (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A x)))
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A y)))
   · # (left_functor A)
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
          (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
        · # (right_functor A)
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
               (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
               (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)))
   · # (left_functor A)
       (# (right_functor A)
          (# (left_functor A)
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y)))) =
# (pr1 (left_functor A))
  (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) x))
⊗^{ V₂} # (pr1 (left_functor A))
          (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A x)))
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A y)))
   · # (left_functor A)
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
          (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
          (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
          (left_functor A (right_functor A y)))
   · # (left_functor A)
       (# (right_functor A)
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
             (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
             (right_functor A x) (right_functor A y)
           · # (left_functor A)
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x y))))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
x, y: V₂
# (pr1 (left_functor A))
  (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) x))
⊗^{ V₂} # (pr1 (left_functor A))
          (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A x)))
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A y)))
   · (# (left_functor A)
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
           (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
           (left_functor A (right_functor A y))
         · # (right_functor A)
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
                (right_functor A x)
                (right_functor A y)))
      · # (left_functor A)
          (# (right_functor A)
             (# (left_functor A)
                (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                   (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA) x
                   y))))) =
# (pr1 (left_functor A))
  (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) x))
⊗^{ V₂} # (pr1 (left_functor A))
          (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A x)))
     (right_functor A
        (left_functor A (right_functor A y)))
   · (# (left_functor A)
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
           (left_functor A (right_functor A x))
           (left_functor A (right_functor A y)))
      · # (left_functor A)
          (# (right_functor A)
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
                (right_functor A x)
                (right_functor A y)
              · # (left_functor A)
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
                     x y)))))

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_functor A)))
 
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_functor A)
    (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
       (left_functor A)) I_{ V₂} =
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
· whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
    (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
       (left_adjoint A)) I_{ V₂}

     (comp_fmonoidal_lax

           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂

  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) I_{ V₂})) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A) (identity I_{ V₁})
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) I_{ V₂}))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) I_{ V₂})) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· identity (left_functor A I_{ V₁})
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) I_{ V₂}))

      
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat

  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)

     (monoidal_adjunit HA)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)

        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax

     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax

  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)

fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit

· # (pr1 (left_functor A))

· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit

· # (pr1 (left_functor A))
    (pr1 (adjunit A) (pr1 (right_functor A) I_{ V₂}))

      apply idpath.

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (comp_fmonoidal_lax
           (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (whiskering.pre_whisker (right_adjoint A)
     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)
        (left_adjoint A)))
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     · # (right_functor A)
         (fmonoidal_preservesunit
            (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
· # (left_functor A)
    (# (right_functor A)
       (# (left_functor A)
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit
             (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)))) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
· # (left_functor A)
    (# (right_functor A)
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit
          (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
        · # (left_functor A)
            (fmonoidal_preservesunit
               (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))))

A: adjunction V₁ V₂

  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)

· (# (left_functor A)

        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
      · # (right_functor A)
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit
             (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
   · # (left_functor A)
       (# (right_functor A)
          (# (left_functor A)
             (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))))) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· (# (left_functor A)
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA))
   · # (left_functor A)
       (# (right_functor A)
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit
             (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
           · # (left_functor A)
               (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)))))

A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
H:= is_mon_nat_trans_prewhisker
  (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
  (is_mon_nat_trans_postwhisker
     (monoidal_adjunit HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)): is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax (identity_fmonoidal V₁)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))

     (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)

     (whiskering.post_whisker (adjunit A)

  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)

       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     · # (right_functor A)

            (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
          · # (left_functor A)

                 (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)))) =

  (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
· # (left_functor A)
    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
       (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     · # (right_functor A)
         (fmonoidal_preservesunit
            (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)
          · # (left_functor A)

V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
sym_monoidal_cmd V₂


V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
sym_monoidal_cmd V₂

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
Comonad (pr1 V₂)
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
fmonoidal_lax (pr1 V₂) (pr1 V₂) (pr1 ?T)
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor (pr2 V₂) (pr2 V₂) ?Tm
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans ?Tm (comp_fmonoidal_lax ?Tm ?Tm)
  (δ ?T)
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans ?Tm (identity_fmonoidal_lax (pr1 V₂))
  (ε ?T)

  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
Comonad (pr1 V₂)
 exact (Comonad_from_adjunction A).
  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
fmonoidal_lax (pr1 V₂) (pr1 V₂)
  (pr1 (Comonad_from_adjunction A))
 exact (comp_fmonoidal_lax
             (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
             (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)).
  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor (pr2 V₂) (pr2 V₂)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
 exact (is_symmetric_monoidal_comp
             (is_symmetric_monoidal_functor_right_adjoint HA)
             (is_symmetric_monoidal_functor_left_adjoint HA)).
  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax
        (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
        (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA)))
  (δ (Comonad_from_adjunction A))
 exact (sym_monoidal_adjunction_to_sym_monoidal_cmd_comult A HA).
  
V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
A: adjunction V₁ V₂
HA: sym_monoidal_adjunction V₁ V₂ A
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax (fmonoidal_lax_right_adjoint HA)
     (fmonoidal_lax_left_adjoint HA))
  (identity_fmonoidal_lax (pr1 V₂))
  (ε (Comonad_from_adjunction A))
 exact (monoidal_adjcounit HA).
Defined.
